MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Thomas S. Lucas, Trustee is present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ansel Gulley is present.
Attorney Jeffrey S. Jacobi representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge pro tem Amanda Fischer and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-31-2011 is vacated.
